title: BigBear.ai CEO Kevin McAleenan Accepts 2026 Wash100 Award
text: BigBear.ai CEO Kevin McAleenan has been recognized with a 2026 Wash100 Award, honoring his leadership and strategic vision. McAleenan's appointment as CEO has been marked by significant strategic initiatives focused on national security and AI-enabled defense solutions. The Wash100 recognition reflects McAleenan's success in executing a strategic transformation that includes reducing debt, strengthening the balance sheet, completing major acquisitions, and positioning BigBear.ai for growth in the Pentagon's AI acceleration strategy. Under McAleenan's leadership, BigBear.ai has strengthened its national security focus, establishing partnerships and expanding its footprint in defense and intelligence markets. The company has also broadened its international presence, with partnerships in the United Arab Emirates involving organizations such as EDGE and AD Ports Group. McAleenan's strategy emphasizes three key capabilities: deep mission understanding, expert command of applied AI, and a combination of scale and agility vital for adapting to rapidly evolving mission needs. The award recognition acknowledges his impact on the government contracting industry and his vision for BigBear.ai's future.
